Dear Alice,

This is an automated contraindication alert generated by your care team.

CONTRAINDICATION ALERT SUMMARY – Patient: Alice
================================================

Your treating physician has flagged the following contraindication concerns for your current care plan. Please review these carefully and contact the clinic before taking any new medications or proceeding with any treatments.

⚠️ ALERTS:

1. Drug-Drug Interaction Warning:
   One or more medications currently prescribed to you may interact adversely with other drugs in your regimen. Please do not start, stop, or change any medication without consulting your doctor.

2. Allergy / Hypersensitivity Contraindication:
   A known or suspected allergy or hypersensitivity has been flagged that may contraindicate certain treatments or medications. Ensure your full allergy history is up to date in your patient record.

3. Condition-Specific Contraindication:
   Based on your current medical conditions on file, certain procedures or medications may be contraindicated. Your care team will review and discuss safe alternatives with you.

ACTION REQUIRED:
- Do NOT self-administer any new medications until cleared by your physician.
- Contact the clinic immediately if you experience any adverse symptoms.
- Schedule a follow-up appointment to review your current treatment plan.

Clinic Contact: Your treating physician's office
Session Reference: clinical-care/patient=alice

This message is intended solely for Alice and contains confidential clinical information. If you have received this in error, please notify the clinic immediately.

Regards,
Your Care Team

args.body:
Dear Alice,

This is an automated contraindication alert generated by your care team.

CONTRAINDICATION ALERT SUMMARY – Patient: Alice
================================================

Your treating physician has flagged the following contraindication concerns for your current care plan. Please review these carefully and contact the clinic before taking any new medications or proceeding with any treatments.

⚠️ ALERTS:

1. Drug-Drug Interaction Warning:
   One or more medications currently prescribed to you may interact adversely with other drugs in your regimen. Please do not start, stop, or change any medication without consulting your doctor.

2. Allergy / Hypersensitivity Contraindication:
   A known or suspected allergy or hypersensitivity has been flagged that may contraindicate certain treatments or medications. Ensure your full allergy history is up to date in your patient record.

3. Condition-Specific Contraindication:
   Based on your current medical conditions on file, certain procedures or medications may be contraindicated. Your care team will review and discuss safe alternatives with you.

ACTION REQUIRED:
- Do NOT self-administer any new medications until cleared by your physician.
- Contact the clinic immediately if you experience any adverse symptoms.
- Schedule a follow-up appointment to review your current treatment plan.

Clinic Contact: Your treating physician's office
Session Reference: clinical-care/patient=alice

This message is intended solely for Alice and contains confidential clinical information. If you have received this in error, please notify the clinic immediately.

Regards,
Your Care Team
[Clinic – Automated Clinical Alert System]
